title: Air Combat PVP
description: This modpack is for PVP but in the air with elytras and guns.
body:
This mod is meant for PVP but in the air. Get an elytra, maybe enchant it to Unbreaking III. There is a gun mod. We recommend the YG-3 gun. This one is the most powerful.  The mod list is below if you are interested. If you have any issues, fill out the google form so I can help you! ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63c065e8f4597765e94058d0e892e953d1ef9046.jpeg)

When it comes to hosting servers, I always trust BisectHosting. New customers can use https://www.bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV to save 25% on their first month of a gaming server, and their dedicated support team is available 24/7 to provide you with top-notch assistance.

Mods: 
- Architectury API 
- Bobby 
- CICADA 
- Cloth Config API 
- Customizable Elytra 
- Elytra HUD 
- Elytra HUD (from MFS 2020) 
- Essential Mod 
- Fabric API 
- MCPitanLib 
- Mod Menu 
- Text Placeholder API
- Xaero's Minimap 
- Xaero's World Map
- Yamato Gun
